active_alias.description:
Active wiki-root.toml alias for this workspace, if any is registered. `None`
means no alias resolves to this workspace. v0.3.17+: was `""` sentinel pre-v0.3.17.

api_key_env.description: Name of the env var that holds the NIM API key.

api_key_length.description: Resolved NIM API key length in bytes. 0 if the key env var is unset/empty.

config.description: dotted-key to value map (same shape as `wiki config show-effective`)

config_loaded.description: Whether the per-workspace / per-computer config was loaded successfully.

config_sources.description: dotted-key to source file path map (v0.3.12+)

embed_model.description: Resolved NIM embedding model name from the merged effective config.

embed_model_available.description: Whether the resolved `embed_model` appears in the live NIM `/v1/models` response.

nim_base_url.description: Resolved NIM base URL (host only, no `/v1` segment).

nim_error.description: Human-readable error string from the NIM probe, or `None` on success.

nim_status.description:
HTTP status from the NIM probe, or `None` on network error. v0.3.23+:
bounded to HTTP range [100, 599] (was the u16 range [0, 65535] before).

registry_entries.description: Count of entries in the discovered wiki-root.toml registry (0 if no registry).

wiki_root_path.description: Path to the resolved `wiki-root.toml`, or empty string if no registry entry matched.
